ClippyCore

Use this for a bulletproof Feature Request

name: 🚀 Feature Request about: Suggest a new idea or feature for this project title: '[Feature]: ' labels: enhancement assignees: ''

🚀 Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

✅ Describe the solution you'd like

❓ Describe alternatives you've considered

📷 Additional context & Screenshots

👩‍💻 Optional: Are you willing to implement this feature?

  • [ ] Yes, I'd like to help implement this
  • [ ] No, I'm only suggesting the idea
